title: Imperial starship
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
An '''[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] starship''', a type of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]], was hijacked at [[Gordon]] on [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]] by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Annikin Starkiller]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], [[R2-D2/Legends|Artwo]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|Threepio]] as they escaped from the trap set aboard the [[Baltarian freighter]] by [[Espaa Valorum|Valorum]].

It was docked in a secured area, but was accessed through subterfuge and jury rigging. Two bubble-domed turrets allowed crew to fire [[Laser cannon/Legends|lazercannons]] at opposing craft. It was equipped with [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], which covered individual sections of the ship.

It was pursued by [[hunter destroyer]]s, a type of Imperial ship. After enduring a barrage of [[Torpedo/Legends|torpedoes]] and laser shots, it became heavily damaged over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]], where the crew bailed out into [[Escape pod/Legends|life pods]].

==Behind the scenes==
"Imperial starship" was the name given to this craft in the rough draft script. It may be a [[Banta Four]]. If it had two manned turrets and room for 5-7 crew it was a rather large starfighter.

It is the conceptual predecessor to the "pirate ship" that eventually became the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]] in later drafts.

There is no sign of a hyperdrive, and the astrography is ambiguous, though they navigate using a [[Galaxy/Legends|galactic]] map.

In ''[[The Making of Star Wars: The Definitive Story Behind the Original Film]]'', the ship is referred to as a "royal starship". It is an Imperial ship in the script.
